title: チャンピオンズCにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Champions Cup arrives. Chukyo
Racecourse, which also hosts popular turf races, is
just under maximum capacity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon has rediscovered her original dream
of simply shining, but she appears nervous. I let
her know that she'll be all right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon has rediscovered her original dream
of simply shining, but she appears nervous. I let
her know that she'll be all right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She decides to shine as bright as she can. Holding
that feeling close to her chest, Smart Falcon
heads to the track.
